chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D-4952 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection No.18. 2. For hearing of CMA No.211095/2022 (stay) 3. For hearing of Main Case 30.08.2022 Mr. Jawad A. Qureshi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. G. M. Bhutto, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Muhammad Idrees, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Amir Baksh Metlo, Advocate for the Respondent..-.-.-.-.-. Mr. G. M. Bhutto, learned Assistant Attorney General present in Court and has waived notice on behalf of the respondents. Learned counsel states that appeal has been filed before the Commissioner (Appeals-VII) alongwith stay application, which is pending adjudication. Learned counsel states that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition, if directions are issued to the said Commissioner to take up the stay application, if not appeal, within shortest possible time. Learned Assistant Attorney General has no objection for grant of this prayer made by the counsel for the petitioner. The instant petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals-VII) to hear and decide the stay application, if not appeal, in accordance with law within fifteen days’ time from the date of receipt of this order. Till such date no coercive measures for recovery be adopted. Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE SM
